<table border="1" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="400">
<tr>
<td>
<table border="0" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="100%">
<tr>
<th align="center" colspan="2" style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="25">  Notice
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="20">
</td><td align="center"> This article is about a clan that has been tagged dead. Any info is to be considered purely of historical value. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
</td></tr></table>
</td></tr></table>

'''Ancient Millenium Warriors''' ('''(AMW)''') (December 2004 - July 2005) was a strictly 100 % loading time playing clan made as a merger of [[Millenium Warriors]] and [[Ancient Warriors]].

== History ==
Clan was made by -Liquid-, Andy Tran and Miniman as a merger between [[Millenium Warriors]] and [[Ancient Warriors]]. After a certain period clan got very inactive, most likely the only active player was Loop who left AMW to join HW in end of June 2005.

== Members ==
=== Leaders ===
* -Liquid-
* Andy Tran
* Miniman

=== Normal members ===
* FragCrazy
* Loop
* MaDDoG
* ReddPuke
* Stiltzkin

== Clan Wars ==
N/A

== External links ==
* [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=19738 Ancient Millenium Warriors GU thread]

[[Category:Clans]]
[[Category:Retired clans]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721135641/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Ancient_Millenium_Warriors -->
